qa_pairs.question: What is the primary benefit of installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder?
qa_pairs.answer: Installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder makes the code accessible to any other member of the group.

qa_pairs.question: Which tool is used to install FreeSurfer in a shared location as described in the documentation?
qa_pairs.answer: EasyBuild is used to install FreeSurfer in a shared location.

qa_pairs.question: Where will FreeSurfer be installed when following the shared folder installation procedure?
qa_pairs.answer: FreeSurfer will be installed under the directory `/home/$USER/projects/def-someuser/$USER/software`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the default location for the FreeSurfer module file after a shared folder installation using EasyBuild?
qa_pairs.answer: The module will be installed under the user's directory `/home/$USER/.local/easybuild/modules/2020/Core/freesurfer`.

qa_pairs.question: Can FreeSurfer be installed in a shared location like `/project`?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, using EasyBuild, it is possible to install FreeSurfer in a shared location like `/project`.
